sections.paragraph:
fut. יִשְׁלׄף-

(1) to draw out (Ch. id., kindred to שָׁלָה שָׁלַל No. II., נָשַׁל), as a weapon from a wound, Job 20:25 a sword from its sheath, to draw the sword, Num 22:23, 31 Num 22:31 Jos 5:13, אֶלֶף שֹׁלֵף חֶרֶב “a thousand men drawing the sword,” i.e. armed, Jud. 8:10 20:2 , 15 Jdg 20:15, 17 Jdg 20:17, 46 Jdg 20:46 2Sa 24:9.

(2) to draw off a shoe, Rth 4:7, .

(3) to pluck off, or up, grass, Psa 129:6.
